exercises.title: Shor Code Encoder
exercises.description: Implement the full encoding circuit for the 9-qubit Shor code.
tasks: Start from |ψ⟩|00000000⟩ (9 qubits total)
Apply phase-flip encoding across blocks
Apply bit-flip encoding within each block
Verify |0⟩ and |1⟩ encode correctly
Test that |+⟩ creates proper superposition
hints: Phase encoding: CNOT from q0 to q3, CNOT from q0 to q6
Then bit-flip each block: CNOT pairs within blocks
Finally Hadamard on q0, q3, q6

exercises.title: Complete Stabilizer Measurement
exercises.description: Implement all 8 stabilizer measurements for syndrome extraction.
tasks: Build all 6 Z-type stabilizers as matrices
Build both X-type stabilizers as matrices
Implement syndrome extraction function
Create syndrome lookup table for decoding
Test with X, Y, Z errors on each qubit
hints: Use np.kron iteratively to build operators

exercises.title: Error Correction Simulator
exercises.description: Simulate complete error correction cycle with random errors.
tasks: Implement random error injection (X, Y, or Z)
Measure syndrome and decode error
Apply correction and verify state recovery
Simulate many trials and compute success rate
Compare with theoretical prediction for small p
hints: Single-qubit error with probability p: 9 locations × 3 types
Success rate should be 1 - O(p²) for small p
Track which error types cause failures

exercises.title: Logical Operator Analysis
exercises.description: Verify and analyze logical operators for the Shor code.
tasks: Construct X_L = X₀X₁...X₈ and verify it swaps |0⟩_L ↔ |1⟩_L
Construct Z_L = Z₀Z₃Z₆ and verify eigenvalues on logical states
Show that equivalent Z_L choices (Z₁Z₄Z₇, etc.) give same result
Verify [X_L, Z_L] anticommutes: X_L Z_L = -Z_L X_L
Show logical operators commute with all stabilizers
hints: For anticommutation: compute X_L @ Z_L and Z_L @ X_L
Commutation with stabilizers: [L, S] = LS - SL = 0
